title: Arthur Cameron Deluxe Oval Wicker Laundry Basket Wash Bin with Lid (Large, Antique Wash)
features: New full wicker oval laundry basket with removable lid available in two sizes
Light Weight Wicker Basket (heavier with lots of laundry in)
Removable Iid for quick, non fuss opening/closing
description: Product Description Classic Hand-Crafted Wicker Laundry Baskets Upgrade your laundry storage with our handwoven wicker laundry bins, available in rectangular, oval, and deluxe variants, each coming in a medium or large. Durable and elegant, these wicker baskets offer a perfect blend of style and practicality, making them an ideal storage solution for any home. Unmatched Craftsmanship Each laundry basket is meticulously handwoven by skilled artisans in Northern China, utilizing time-honoured techniques passed down over generations. Removable Cotton Lining The neutral, removable cotton lining easily lifts out, making it simple to empty and maintain, keeping your laundry bin fresh with minimal effort. Machine-Washable Fabric The soft cotton lining is fully washable, ensuring hygiene and long-lasting use. Simply remove and wash as needed to maintain a clean laundry space. Variety of Finishes Available in a variety of colours, these wicker laundry baskets complement any décor, offering plenty of options to suit your home’s aesthetic. Timeless Craftsmanship: Handwoven Wicker Laundry Baskets in Three Elegant Styles Our laundry bins are expertly handwoven using full, round willow wicker, ensuring both durability and timeless beauty. Choose from three distinctive styles: the classic rectangular, elegant oval, and the deluxe variant for added sophistication. Each design offers a unique shape and size, allowing you to select the one that best complements your home’s décor. Whether you prefer a sleek, modern look or a more traditional style, our wicker baskets bring both charm and functionality to any space. Previous page The oval basket has a removable lid with no hinge This design allows easy access and makes it perfect for a minimalist, easy-to-use solution. The rectangular basket features a hinged lid The velcro-strap hinged lid keeps your laundry neatly concealed and can be easily removed. The deluxe basket comes with a metal-hinged lid The strong metal hinge ensures the lid remains in place, designed for durability and ease of use. Carrying made easy with the deluxe basket handles The deluxe basket includes built-in handles, allowing you to move your full laundry bin with ease. The deluxe basket features a durable wooden frame The robust wooden reinforcement ensures lasting durability while keeping a sleek, refined design. Wicker refers to the craftsmanship and weaving technique, not the material itself. The weaving can be done using various natural materials, including cane, rattan, willow, seagrass, water hyacinth, and many other types of plant fibers. What is this basket made of? This basket is made from willow, a naturally smooth and pliable material. Its softness and flexibility make it ideal for crafting baskets and trays in a variety of shapes and sizes, allowing for both sturdy construction and intricate weaving. What is the difference between Rattan and Willow? Rattan is typically a rougher material that requires steaming before it can be twisted and shaped. In contrast, willow baskets are made using the whole willow branch, resulting in a naturally glossy finish that adds to their smooth, refined look. Why are the listed sizes approximate? Each piece is artisan-made, so slight variations in size and weave are to be expected. These differences add to the one-of-a-kind charm and authenticity of the product. Will the product look exactly the same as in the listing photo? Colours may vary due to monitor settings and lighting during photography. The weave can differ slightly from piece to piece because each item is hand-crafted. We strive for accuracy, but natural variations are part of what makes each product unique.
